tasks.title: Define TypeScript Types for Study Plan and User Profile
tasks.description: Create detailed TypeScript interfaces and types in `src/features/studyPlan/types.ts` for user inputs, global study strategy, daily plan chunk, daily plan item, and plan statuses. Include fields for all user-configurable inputs, daily plan content, and statuses (Not started, In progress, Completed, Skipped, Partially completed).
acceptanceCriteria: All user input fields are typed
Global strategy and daily plan chunk types defined
Daily plan item includes all required fields (date, day number, tasks, estimated minutes, etc.)
Plan statuses enumerated
tasks.expectedResult: TypeScript types file `src/features/studyPlan/types.ts` exists with comprehensive type definitions for the study plan feature

outputPlan.description: TypeScript types for user profile, global strategy, daily plan chunk, daily plan item, and statuses

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides foundational type safety and structure for the study plan feature

tasks.title: Implement Utility Functions to Calculate Date Ranges and Plan Metrics
tasks.description: Create utility functions in `src/features/studyPlan/utils/dateUtils.ts` to calculate today's date, exam date, total days, study days, rest days, weeks count, final review period, and mock test schedule based on user inputs. Include functions to generate arrays of dates and week numbers for the plan duration.
acceptanceCriteria: Functions correctly compute total days and study/rest days
Functions generate continuous date arrays without gaps
Functions calculate week numbers and final review period
Unit tests cover edge cases (e.g., exam date before today)
tasks.expectedResult: Utility module with date and plan metric calculation functions implemented and tested

outputPlan.description: Utility functions for date calculations and plan metrics

metadata.inputContext: TypeScript types for user profile and plan
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables accurate calculation of plan duration and scheduling parameters

tasks.title: Design and Implement Global Study Strategy Generator Service
tasks.description: Implement `generateGlobalStudyStrategy()` function in `src/features/studyPlan/services/globalStrategyService.ts` that takes user profile and plan metrics, and calls AI to generate a high-level study roadmap including phases, weekly goals, mock test schedule, and final week strategy. The function should parse and validate AI response JSON against defined schema.
acceptanceCriteria: AI call is made with correct prompt and user profile context
Response is parsed and validated against schema
Global strategy object includes phases, weekly goals, mock test schedule, final week strategy
Errors in AI response are handled gracefully
tasks.expectedResult: Global study strategy generator service implemented and tested with AI integration

outputPlan.description: Service to generate and validate global study strategy via AI

metadata.inputContext: User profile data, plan metrics from dateUtils
evidence: AI call made and response validated
Service returns valid global strategy object
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Produces the high-level roadmap guiding daily plan generation

tasks.title: Implement Local-First Storage Layer for Study Plan Data
tasks.description: Create IndexedDB-based storage module in `src/features/studyPlan/storage/studyPlanStore.ts` to save, update, retrieve, and delete global strategy and daily plan chunks. Each plan and daily item must have stable IDs, createdAt, updatedAt timestamps, and status fields. Implement APIs to query missing or invalid days for recovery.
acceptanceCriteria: IndexedDB store created with object stores for global strategy and daily plan items
CRUD APIs implemented with stable IDs and timestamps
Status fields supported for daily plan items
APIs to query missing, invalid, or incomplete days implemented
Data schema validated with zod or similar
tasks.expectedResult: Local-first storage module implemented and tested for study plan data persistence

outputPlan.description: IndexedDB storage module for global strategy and daily plan chunks

metadata.inputContext: TypeScript types for study plan data
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides persistent local storage for the study plan and supports recovery and progress tracking

tasks.title: Implement AI Chunked Daily Plan Generator Service
tasks.description: Develop `generateDailyPlanChunk()` function in `src/features/studyPlan/services/dailyPlanService.ts` that requests AI to generate a chunk of daily plans for a specified date range. The function must include user profile, global strategy, already generated days summary, and chunk boundaries in the prompt. It must parse, validate, and return only the requested days without duplicates or gaps.
acceptanceCriteria: AI prompt includes all required context and chunk boundaries
Response JSON is parsed and validated against daily plan chunk schema
Only requested days are returned, no duplicates or skipped dates
Errors or invalid responses trigger retry logic for only missing/invalid days
tasks.expectedResult: Daily plan chunk generator service implemented with AI integration and validation

outputPlan.description: Service to generate and validate daily plan chunks via AI

metadata.inputContext: User profile, global strategy, date ranges
evidence: AI calls made with chunked requests
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables chunked generation of daily plans with validation and retry

tasks.title: Implement Validation Logic for AI Responses and Daily Plan Data
tasks.description: Create validation utilities in `src/features/studyPlan/utils/validation.ts` to check AI responses and daily plan data for correct date formats, day numbers, week numbers, phases, estimated study time, required tasks, no duplicates, no skipped dates, and no invalid formats. Include functions to detect missing or invalid days for retry.
acceptanceCriteria: Validation functions cover all required rules
Functions return detailed error info for invalid days
Unit tests cover valid and invalid cases
Validation supports partial retries for missing/invalid days
tasks.expectedResult: Validation utilities implemented and tested for AI response and daily plan data integrity

outputPlan.description: Validation functions for AI responses and daily plan data

metadata.inputContext: TypeScript types for study plan data
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures data integrity and supports robust retry logic

tasks.title: Implement Study Plan Generation Orchestrator with Chunked AI Calls and Validation
tasks.description: Develop orchestrator module in `src/features/studyPlan/orchestrator.ts` that manages the full plan generation lifecycle: creates global strategy, calculates dates, initializes empty plan, iteratively calls daily plan chunk generator, validates responses, saves valid chunks to local storage, detects missing/invalid days, retries only those days, and stops when full plan is complete. Supports cancel, resume, and progress reporting.
acceptanceCriteria: Orchestrator generates global strategy first
Generates daily plan chunks sequentially until full plan complete
Validates each chunk and retries only missing/invalid days
Saves progress incrementally to local storage
Supports cancel and resume
Emits progress messages for UI
No duplicate or skipped days in final plan
tasks.expectedResult: Orchestrator module implemented and tested to generate complete study plan with chunked AI calls and validation

outputPlan.description: Orchestrator managing chunked AI generation, validation, storage, and progress

metadata.inputContext: Global strategy service, daily plan service, validation utils, storage module, date utils
evidence: Full plan generated with no missing days
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Core logic ensuring complete, validated, chunked study plan generation

tasks.title: Create React Context and Hooks for Study Plan State Management
tasks.description: Implement React context provider and hooks in `src/features/studyPlan/hooks/useStudyPlan.tsx` to manage study plan state, including global strategy, daily plan items, generation status, progress messages, and user actions (cancel, resume, retry chunk, regenerate full plan). Connect to orchestrator and local storage.
acceptanceCriteria: Context provides current plan state and generation status
Hooks expose functions to start, cancel, resume, retry, and regenerate plan
State updates reflect progress messages and plan data
Connected to local storage for persistence
tasks.expectedResult: React context and hooks implemented for study plan state management and user interaction

outputPlan.description: React context and hooks for study plan state and control

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides UI state management and user control over study plan generation

tasks.title: Implement Daily Plan List React Component with Progress and Status Display
tasks.description: Create `DailyPlanList.tsx` component in `src/features/studyPlan/components/` that displays the full daily plan from today to exam day. Show each day's date, day number, phase, main goal, tasks summary, estimated minutes, and status (Not started, In progress, Completed, Skipped, Partially completed). Include UI to mark day status and edit daily plan items.
acceptanceCriteria: Component renders all days in order with no gaps or duplicates
Displays all required daily plan fields
Supports marking day status and editing tasks
Reflects real-time updates from context state
tasks.expectedResult: Daily plan list component implemented and integrated with context state

outputPlan.description: React component to display and manage daily plan list with statuses

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides user interface to view and interact with the generated study plan

tasks.title: Implement Progress Messaging and User Feedback UI During Plan Generation
tasks.description: Add progress message display component `PlanGenerationProgress.tsx` in `src/features/studyPlan/components/` that shows messages like 'Creating global study strategy', 'Generating days 1 to 3 of 30', 'Checking missing days', and 'Finalizing your IELTS study plan'. Integrate with context state to update messages in real-time during generation.
acceptanceCriteria: Progress messages update in real-time during generation
Messages correspond to current generation step
UI is visually clear and accessible
tasks.expectedResult: Progress messaging component implemented and integrated with generation state

outputPlan.description: Component to display progress messages during plan generation

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Improves user experience by showing generation progress

tasks.title: Implement User Controls for Plan Generation: Cancel, Resume, Retry, Regenerate
tasks.description: Add UI buttons and handlers in `src/features/studyPlan/components/PlanControls.tsx` to allow users to cancel ongoing generation, resume paused generation, retry failed chunks, and regenerate the full plan. Connect controls to context hooks and orchestrator functions. Ensure state updates and progress messages reflect user actions.
acceptanceCriteria: Buttons trigger correct orchestrator actions
State and UI update accordingly
Cancel stops generation cleanly
Resume continues from last saved state
Retry only regenerates failed chunks
Regenerate clears existing plan and restarts
tasks.expectedResult: User control component implemented and integrated with plan generation logic

outputPlan.description: UI controls for managing plan generation lifecycle

evidence: State updates and progress messages reflect actions
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables user control over plan generation process

tasks.title: Implement AI Tutor Note Feature for Daily Plan Items
tasks.description: Add support in daily plan item model and UI to include AI Tutor notes explaining why a task was recommended. Extend daily plan item type and update `DailyPlanList.tsx` to display AI Tutor notes. Provide a button to ask AI Tutor for explanation on any task, triggering an AI call and showing the response inline.
acceptanceCriteria: Daily plan items include AI Tutor note field
UI displays AI Tutor notes clearly
User can request AI Tutor explanation per task
AI call returns explanation and updates UI
tasks.expectedResult: AI Tutor note feature implemented and integrated with daily plan UI

outputPlan.description: Add AI Tutor note field to daily plan item type
Display AI Tutor notes and add button to request explanations
Add AI Tutor explanation call logic

metadata.inputContext: Daily plan types, daily plan UI, AI integration
evidence: AI Tutor notes appear in UI
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enhances user understanding of recommended tasks via AI Tutor explanations

tasks.title: Add Unit and Integration Tests for Study Plan Feature Modules
tasks.description: Write comprehensive unit tests for types, utilities, services, validation, orchestrator, and React components in `src/features/studyPlan/__tests__/`. Include tests for chunked AI generation, validation logic, storage persistence, orchestrator retry behavior, and UI rendering and interaction.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit tests cover at least 80% of new code
Integration tests verify chunked generation and retry logic
UI tests cover user interactions and state updates
All tests pass reliably
tasks.expectedResult: Test suite implemented and passing for study plan feature
